description_long: This is a two-story modern house with a flat roof and a mix of stone and light-colored exterior walls. The front features a covered carport with a translucent roof, a driveway, and a small landscaped area with shrubs and a tree. Large windows are distributed asymmetrically across the facade, providing ample natural light to the interior. The backyard includes a patio area with outdoor furniture and a garden, enclosed by a privacy fence. The house has multiple entry points, including a main door with a small porch and a secondary access from the backyard. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, functional outdoor spaces, and a blend of natural and contemporary materials.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, stone and light-colored walls, large windows, a carport, and landscaped outdoor areas. The design features clean lines and functional spaces, including a backyard patio and garden.
description_view_0: Front view showing the carport, driveway, main entry, and landscaped front yard.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the carport roof, side windows, and privacy fencing.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard patio, garden, and secondary entryway.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a clear look at the backyard, outdoor furniture, and side garden.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry with a single door, small porch, and minimal overhang, flanked by landscaping and adjacent to the carport.
